projects.title: Project 3
projects.description: End-to-end UX redesign of a B2B SaaS dashboard — research, information architecture, wireframes, and a full component library delivered in six weeks.

projects.title: Project 4
projects.description:
Packaging design for a specialty coffee brand entering three new Latin American markets.

The system spans primary packaging, secondary boxes, and digital assets, all built around a single visual language that balances premium positioning with local cultural references.
